payload.answer: Which Brutto did you mean — the restaurant in London or something else?

entity_resolution.reason: The note mentions only “Brutto.” Existing context includes a Brutto restaurant in London and another Brutto alias/article reference, so the system should not automatically merge the note into the restaurant entity without clarification.

memory_cards.statement: The user said “Brutto was better than expected,” but the referenced Brutto is ambiguous.

details: Preserved ambiguity in the Brutto reference.
Did not present the statement as a current fact about the London restaurant.

repair_options: Attach the note to Brutto restaurant in London if the user confirms it refers to the restaurant.
Create or use a separate Brutto entity if the user meant the article/alias or another Brutto.
Keep the note as an unresolved mention of Brutto until clarified.
